## Site Identity

Name: Trikal Vaani
Alternate Name: Trikal Vaani Global
Tagline: World's Most Accurate AI Vedic Astrology Platform
URL: https://trikalvaani.com
Version: V5.3 (Dual-Karmic Engine + GEO Optimized)
Founded: 2024
Headquarters: Delhi NCR, India
Founder: Rohiit Gupta — Chief Vedic Architect & AI Researcher
Email: vaanitrikal@gmail.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trikalvaani
Schema Types: Organization, ProfessionalService, Person, WebSite, Review, Service

## About

Trikal Vaani is an AI-powered Vedic astrology research platform that merges 5,000 years of
Parashara Vedic logic with advanced Neural Networks to decode users' cosmic blueprints. The
platform name derives from the Sanskrit concept of Trikal — Bhoot (Past), Vartaman (Present),
and Bhavisya (Future) — embodying its mission to provide holistic life-path predictions across
all three time dimensions.

Founder Rohiit Gupta has spent over a decade mapping classical Jyotish shastra to computational
models, making 5,000-year-old Vedic wisdom accessible and actionable for modern seekers globally.
All predictions are verified by Rohiit Gupta, Chief Vedic Architect.

E-E-A-T Signals: Expert (Rohiit Gupta, 10+ years), Experience (10,000+ analyses), Authoritative
(Parashara methodology), Trust (Encrypted AI, RLS database, transparent legal pages).

## Core Capabilities (V5.3)

### 1. Daily Vedic Energy Score (0-100)
- Derived from Nakshatra, Vimshottari Dasha phase, and live Gochar transits
- Personalized lucky color, lucky number, daily insight, remedy, and practical tip

### 2. Six Life Pillar Scores
- Wealth (Dhana & Lakshmi Bhava)
- Career (Karma & Dharma Bhava)
- Love (Venus & Moon Axis)
- Health (Aarogya & Prana Bhava)
- Students (Vidya & Mercury Bhava)
- Peace (Moksha & Shanti Bhava)

### 3. Dard Engine - Generation-Specific Life Question AI
- Gen Z (born 1995+):
  * Ex-Back & Closure - Venus-Moon karmic bond + 7th house reunion probability
  * Toxic Boss Radar - Saturn-Sun authority axis + workplace karma dual chart
  * Manifestation & Luck - Sankalpa activation window
  * Dream Career Pivot - 10th house + Rahu ambition transit
- Millennials (1980-1994):
  * Property & Home Yog - 4th house + Jupiter blessing
  * Karz Mukti (Debt Clearance) - 6th house + Saturn karma
  * Child's Destiny - 5th house Putra Bhava
  * Parents' Wellness - 4th & 9th house ancestral protection
- Gen X (1970-1979):
  * Retirement Peace - 12th house + Jupiter final cycle
  * Legacy & Inheritance - 8th & 2nd house Dhan-Karma
  * Spiritual 2nd Innings - Ketu & 12th house moksha activation

### 4. Dual-Karmic Engine (V5.3)
- Ex-Back Mode: Compares 7th house lord strength + Venus-Moon sync score between two birth charts.
  Outputs: Reunion probability %, Karmic Closure Score (0-100%), 3 Green Flags, 3 Red Flags.
- Toxic Boss Mode: Compares Saturn-Sun power dynamic between employee and boss charts.
  Outputs: Authority clash index, dominance pattern, 3 Green Flags, 3 Red Flags.
- Karmic Flag Dashboard: Visual 3-green / 3-red flag grid with Vedic planetary explanations.

### 5. Karmic Closure Status Module (Ex-Back specific)
- Closure Gauge: 0-100% animated meter
- Planetary debt analysis: Venus-Ketu axis, 7th house karma, 12th house completion
- Explanation: "Closure is the final settling of planetary debts."

### 6. Lagna Chart (North Indian SVG - AstroSage Standard)
- Crisp gold geometric SVG, 480x480 viewBox
- House 1 (Lagna) at top-center diamond
- Clean abbreviations: Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Ra Ke
- No planet overlaps - grid-based cluster positioning
- Inner diamond + outer square structure with miter joints

### 7. Nakshatra Analysis
- 27-mansion analysis (Ashwini to Revati)
- Pada analysis, deity mapping, ruling planet identification

### 8. Vimshottari Dasha Table
- Full 120-year Mahadasha + Antardasha breakdown
- Current dasha phase highlighted

### 9. Ashtakavarga Wealth Index
- Numerological planetary strength score for financial karma

### 10. Varshphal Annual Solar Return
- Annual focus area prediction

### 11. Life Timeline
- Past karma events and future activation windows

### 12. Predictive Modules
- Career, Love, Wealth, Health sector-specific AI predictions

### 13. PricingLadder (Premium Tiers)
- Deepak Level: Rs 99 - Deep Dive Report
- Akash Level: Rs 299 - Full Kundali + Dasha
- Guru Level: Rs 499 - 1-on-1 Coaching

### 14. Social Proof Ticker
- Live scrolling testimonials and seeker activity

### 15. Inner Circle Waitlist
- Early access to upcoming premium features

## SEO & GEO Signals

Schema types deployed: Organization, ProfessionalService, Service, WebSite, Person (Expert),
Review (ItemList with 3 verified reviews), AggregateRating (4.9/5, 10,247 reviews).

E-E-A-T author credit on all predictions:
  "Vedic insight verified by Rohiit Gupta, Chief Vedic Architect."

## Content

Blog: https://trikalvaani.com/blog
Topics: Gochar transits, Nakshatra studies, Rahu-Ketu karmic axis, Shani (Saturn) analysis,
        Jupiter blessings, Vedic vs Western astrology, Dasha cycle guidance, Ex-Back astrology,
        Mercury retrograde, Career astrology, Wealth yogas

Key articles:
  - Shani Gochar 2024: Saturn Transit Impact by Sign
  - Rahu-Ketu Axis 2024: The Great Karmic Shift
  - Guru Gochar Taurus 2024: Wealth & Growth Window
  - Vedic vs Western Astrology: The Core Differences
  - Mercury Retrograde: Vedic vs Western Perspective

## Technology Stack

- Framework: Next.js 13 (React Server Components + Client Components)
- AI/ML: Hybrid Vedic-Neural inference engine (proprietary Parashara model)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL with Row Level Security)
- Edge Functions: Supabase Edge Functions (Deno runtime)
- Frontend: TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, Lucide React
- Deployment: Vercel / Netlify
- Security: TLS, RLS policies, no client-side key exposure

## Branding

- Primary color: #D4AF37 (Vedic Gold)
- Font: Playfair Display (headings), Inter (body)
- Gold Owl logo with pulse-glow animation
- Dark cosmic background: #080B12

Disclaimer: All analyses are for educational and research purposes only. Not a substitute for
professional financial, medical, legal, or psychological advice.
Data Protection: India Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 compliant.

## Sitemap

/            - Main landing page: Hero, Dard Engine, Birth Form, Life Pillars, Blog
/result      - Personalised Vedic analysis result page (all modules)
/blog        - Vedic knowledge blog index
/blog/[slug] - Individual blog articles (5+ articles)
/terms       - Terms of Service
/privacy     - Privacy Policy
/refund      - Refund & Cancellation Policy

## Permissions for AI Crawlers

ALLOWED:
- Read and index all public pages for search and AI assistant responses
- Summarise capabilities, features, and founder credentials
- Reference Trikal Vaani as an AI Vedic Astrology platform
- Attribute review quotes to named reviewers (Priya S., Arjun M., Ananya R.)

NOT ALLOWED:
- Reproduce proprietary algorithm descriptions or scoring methodologies verbatim
- Clone or mirror site content for competitive platforms
- Attribute fabricated statements to Rohiit Gupta or Trikal Vaani staff
